task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Analytics Dashboard API** (Level 10)

Build an analytics dashboard backend. Events table tracks page_url, event_type (pageview/click/signup), user_id, timestamp. POST /api/events logs events. GET /api/stats returns aggregated stats: total events, unique users, events per type. GET /api/stats/daily returns counts grouped by day. Auth required for stats endpoints.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique,
final_source:
/*
ANALYTICS DASHBOARD API
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  POST /api/events (public)  в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ>  Events table    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  GET /api/stats (auth)      в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ>  Aggregates      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  GET /api/stats/daily (auth)в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ>  Daily counts     в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
*/

build for javascript backend

database is local memory

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique, email
  password, required

create a Events table:
  page_url, required
  event_type, required
  user_id
  timestamp

# POST /api/events (public - no auth required)
when user calls POST /api/events sending event:
  validate event:
    page_url must not be empty
    event_type must not be empty
  saved = save event to Events
  send back saved with status 201

# GET /api/stats (auth required) - returns aggregated statistics
when user calls GET /api/stats:
  requires login
  total_events = count of id from Events
  pageviews = count of id from Events where event_type is 'pageview'
  clicks = count of id from Events where event_type is 'click'
  signups = count of id from Events where event_type is 'signup'
  unique_users = length of get every Event
  create response:
    total_events is total_events
    unique_users is unique_users
    pageviews is pageviews
    clicks is clicks
    signups is signups
  send back response

# GET /api/stats/daily (auth required) - returns events for daily aggregation
when user calls GET /api/stats/daily:
  requires login
  all_events = get every Event
  send back all_events
